productDisplayName: Jockey Women Red Relaxed Lounge Pants
description: Style Note Give your wardrobe a fashionable edge with these lounge pants from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortlessly comfortable. Product Details Red lounge pants that have an elasticated waistband with a drawstring for a customised Fit, contrast black piping along the sides wih insert pockets for that sporty look, rubber print on the left thigh and relaxed fit for ease of movement Material and Care Cotton Machine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Relaxed fit The model (height 5'8" waist 28") is wearing a size 28
